def positive_public_api_returns_none_or_value_without_explicit_optional_contract():
    rule_id = "public_api_returns_none_or_value_without_explicit_optional_contract"
    family = "quality"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Flag public APIs that sometimes return None and sometimes a value without an explicit contract."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
